all_facts.fact: Record history across forks and crashes
First witnesses to genesis block in lore
Create rare NFT scrolls of historical records

The CHAIN SCRIBES are the historians of blockchain, tirelessly documenting Block Topia’s saga across every fork, crash, and rebellion, their work ensuring that no event—however bloody or buried—escapes the immutable record of decentralized truth, preserving the past for generations yet to come.

In their lore, they are the first witnesses to the genesis block, their ancient gaze capturing the birth of blockchain itself, a moment that binds them to an eternal oath of neutrality, recording history without favor as they guard against the erasure of critical knowledge.

Their rare NFT scrolls are digital relics of immense power, each one encrypting a pivotal moment of crypto history, coveted by factions and collectors alike for the truths they hold, often serving as catalysts for rebellion when their contents are decrypted and revealed.

Whispers speak of a ‘Final Ledger’ in development, a mythic record the Scribes are said to be compiling in secret, rumored to contain the ultimate fate of Block Topia, a document so profound that its completion could alter the course of digital history forever.

The CHAIN SCRIBES are the historians of blockchain, tirelessly documenting Block Topia’s saga across every fork, crash, and rebellion, their work ensuring that no event—however bloody or buried—escapes the immutable record of decentralized truth, preserving the raw essence of a world built on code and conflict.

Their creation of rare NFT scrolls, each a fragment of historical record, transforms history into tangible assets, coveted by collectors and scholars alike, yet cursed by some as bearers of hidden truths too dangerous to own, often triggering fierce battles over their possession.

Legends within Block Topia claim that The CHAIN SCRIBES can access 'Echo Ledgers,' ghostly remnants of deleted transactions and failed forks, allowing them to uncover secrets that even the blockchain’s public record has forgotten, making them both revered and feared as keepers of the unseen past.

Their Ledger Vaults are rumored to be protected by ancient cryptographic traps, deadly algorithms that ensnare the unworthy, ensuring that only those deemed pure of intent by the SCRIBES’ cryptic standards may glimpse the full scope of their archived knowledge.
